requirements.description: Paper and supporting-information method sources are locally captured and reviewed.
requirements.note: Evidence identifies the locally reviewed extracted text; it does not fill information absent from the publications.

requirements.description: All 91 Table S2 rows are digitized as a reference dataset.
requirements.note: Digitization is complete, but the scientific column interpretation remains a separate blocker.

requirements.description: A non-production VASP, VASPsol, MPI, PMI2 and Slurm environment smoke chain is documented.
requirements.note: The smoke chain proves environment compatibility only and its energy is permanently ineligible for science.

requirements.description: Production catalyst coordinates, atom order, constraints and structural provenance are scientifically accepted.
requirements.note: The paper and SI do not provide exact runnable coordinates or complete constraints; generated candidates cannot be called author structures.

requirements.description: A production project or scratch root, quota and output-retention policy are approved.
requirements.note: Only the constrained smoke-test location is authorized; no production storage scope or retention policy has been supplied.

requirements.description: Each catalyst, adsorbate and spin variant has an approved production VASP protocol and energy-family identity.
requirements.note: The environment-smoke protocol is deliberately non-production; 3x3x1 relaxation, VASPsol, spin and retention settings still require reviews.

requirements.description: The nitrogen chemical-potential reference used for formation energies is explicitly defined and reviewed.
requirements.note: The publication labels the reference only as nitrogen and does not define the required state or correction convention.

requirements.description: Every surface, gas and adsorbed state has sourced ZPE, enthalpy, entropy, solvation and standard-state corrections.
requirements.note: Per-intermediate vibrational data, gas-table values and the thermochemistry temperature are not supplied in the paper or SI.

requirements.description: CO and HCOOH pathway states and balanced reactions are bound to accepted catalyst and adsorbate identities.
requirements.note: A conceptual draft exists, but exact adsorption configurations and immutable reaction identities cannot precede accepted structures.

requirements.description: The Paper 4 CHE temperature, potential scale, pH and pair-count conventions are complete and approved.
requirements.note: SHE and pH zero are documented, but the thermochemistry temperature is absent and must not default silently.

requirements.description: The Table S2 printed headers and main-text representative values have a single scientifically approved interpretation.
requirements.note: The printed column order conflicts with representative values in the main text; both interpretations must remain visible pending resolution.

requirements.description: Required production runs have complete run bindings and explicit scientific-result acceptance records.
requirements.note: No Paper 4 production calculation has been authorized or run; the prior smoke result is permanently ineligible.

requirements.description: Compatible energies, free energies, CHE results and electronic analyses are derived from accepted production evidence.
requirements.note: Derived Paper 4 results cannot exist before the blocked structures, protocols, thermochemistry and production runs are closed.
